title: eriophorum polystachion f. angustifolium
intro: Eriophorum polystachion f. angustifolium, also known as Cotton Grass, is a variation of the common cotton grass plant, characterized by its narrower leaves. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and treating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cotton Grass include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
